_comment: CI-ONLY Claude Code settings. Deliberately NOT at .claude/settings.json: the Stop hook below refuses to let the agent stop while objectives remain, and .claude/settings.json is picked up automatically by every local session too — it would block you from ending your own conversations. The dev-requests workflow points at this file explicitly with --settings, so it only ever applies in GitHub Actions.
_permissions_comment: Deny beats allow, always. This job's entire input is arbitrary text a human found somewhere, handed to an agent told to act on it — so the guardrails have to be things the text cannot talk its way past. The .github/** rules are the ones that matter most: they stop a request from rewriting the workflow, the allowlist, or this file. curl/wget close the obvious exfiltration path for ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, which is in the agent's environment. `git -c` is denied because it runs arbitrary commands via core.pager and alias.*, which would otherwise walk straight through the git allowlist.
